demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse; spouse present during the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has been burning for months, but today the pain is agonizing, I feel incredibly weak, and my stool was pitch black.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning pain has become severe and constant since yesterday, and I've passed two black tarry foul-smelling bowel motions today. I feel very weak and go dizzy when I stand up.

symptom_narrative.onset: chronic burning for about 6 months; the severe pain came on and became constant over the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 months of on-and-off burning; 24 hours of severe constant pain
symptom_narrative.character: a burning or gnawing pain high in the upper abdomen, now agonizing and constant
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: usually a nagging burn, but today it is the worst it has ever been and doesn't let up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high in the middle of the belly under the ribs, and it seems to bore through toward my back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: usually comes on between meals or in the early hours of the morning; today it has been constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: in the past, eating something or taking antacids used to settle it for a while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing helps today; it just stays severe
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea, occasional vomiting, a lot of bloating and belching, and really bad breath; today I feel weak, sweaty and dizzy when I stand up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: months of similar but milder burning stomach pain that I've been putting up with
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely get off the couch; I feel faint if I try to stand

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing burning stomach / indigestion for about 6 months
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter antacids and eating to settle it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse is at home and made the call; patient is lying flat on the couch and feels too weak and dizzy to get up

objective_data_offered.value: two loose, black, tarry, foul-smelling bowel motions today
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient description of stool colour and consistency; not examined or tested

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he looks very pale and sweaty and keeps saying he feels faint when he sits up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay observation by the spouse over the phone

objective_data_offered.value: feels dizzy and lightheaded every time he stands up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported symptom; no home blood-pressure device available to quantify
